default.description: Default capabilities for the main window. Desktop only — includes localhost/cleartext exceptions for local LLM servers (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp). Mobile uses capabilities/mobile.json instead.

mobile.description: Capabilities for iOS and Android builds. HTTPS-only — no localhost or cleartext exceptions, by design. The local-LLM path (Ollama / LM Studio / llama.cpp) is desktop-only; mobile uses Apple Intelligence on iOS and HTTPS cloud providers as fallback. See docs/MOBILE_APP_PLAN.md.
